description_long: This is a compact, single-engine jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit featuring a blue-tinted canopy. The wings are mid-mounted and swept back, with prominent black markings along the leading edges and undersides. The tail section consists of a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer, both with dark accent lines. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel, all of which are extended. The engine intake is located at the nose, and the exhaust is at the rear, typical of classic jet fighter designs. The exterior is primarily light gray with black and blue highlights, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance.
description: A compact, swept-wing jet airplane with a forward blue-tinted cockpit, tricycle landing gear, and a single rear jet engine. The body is light gray with black and blue accents.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the swept mid-mounted wings, blue cockpit canopy, and the full tail assembly.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular nose intake, blue-tinted cockpit, and the tricycle landing gear.
description_view_2: Side profile displaying the length of the fuselage, cockpit placement, and the extended landing gear.
description_view_3: Rear view emphasizing the jet exhaust, tail structure, and the underside of the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, swept-back wings with slight dihedral and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted jet engine with rear exhaust.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel, fixed and extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a blue-tinted canopy.
